items.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
items.summary: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
items.summary: The Swift Observatory was launched in 2004, but recent solar storms have pushed its orbit lower, and it's in danger of burning up in Earth's atmosphere as soon as this year. To...
